calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Continued To Aug-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Continued To Jun-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Barton for and with Rosie Thompson (Petitioner).
Richard Collier for and with Sharon Brown Nassiri (Objector).

The matter was called and passed at the request of Mr. Collier for the purpose of allowing Jane Brown Sanchez the opportunity to make an appearance. When called at the end of the calendar, Ms. Sanchez still was not present and the matter went forward. Mr. Barton stated that Ms. Sanchez is not a party in the action. Mr. Collier stated that Jane intends to join. Mr. Barton stated that there is no separate property, that it is all community property, that the problem Mr. Collier is having is that he and his Client are not willing to disclose statements of different bank accounts, and that there is no valid document that entitles the objector to have any information. Mr. Collier stated that they know there is a trust, that there is no indication that the trust was ever revoked, that there are too many questions, that what the Petitioner is asking for is not what Mr. Brown wanted to happen and that there is a lot of information to look into. Mr. Barton stated that the Decedent drafted his own documents, and that there are eight different trust drafts and two invalid wills. Mr. Collier stated that they have concerns and that there are no checks and balances on the Petitioners handling of the bank accounts. The Court noted that there is nothing before it that addresses Mr. Collier concerns. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to June 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to meet and confer and file a joint status statement by June 18, 2019. The meet and confer is to include anybody else who is planning to come into the case.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Continued To Mar-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Barton for and with Rosie Thompson (Petitioner).
Richard Collier for Sharon Browne Nassiri (Objector).

The Court noted that there is now an objection and asks if the parties have talked to each other as to how to proceed. Counsel stated that they have not talked, that it is too early to talk about mediation, that they can't find the trust documents, and that some documents have been provided and reviewed, but it is too soon. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to March 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects that the parties have met and conferred by then so that they can talk about how this is going to go forward, whether they will be filing for probate or whether they will participate in mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
